meaning: adj.[医]静脉曲张的,脉管曲张的
examples: Liver cirrhosis; Esophageal and gastric variceal bleeding; Hemorrhage; Ligation.
A group of 56 cirrhotics undergoing therapeutic variceal decompressive procedures were studied.
Objective To evaluate the effect of octreotide used in esophageal and gastric variceal bleeding patients.
